# tfe_current_user

Get the current user associated with the API token.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `email` (String) The email address of the current user.
- `id` (String) Service-generated identifier for the user.
- `is_service_account` (Boolean) Whether the current user is a service account.
- `username` (String) The username of the current user.
